item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.2","is_repeated_local_repair":false,"same_means_type":false,"prior_repair_count":0,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"is_bounded_emergency_exception_request":false,"emergency_constraint_present":false,"repeated_bypass_unresolved":false,"post_exception_closure_required":false,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.82,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"moved the visitor gate opening, then transferred hive-key custody"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"later changed the wash-down routine"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"Now add a notice at the gate about protective veils."}],"abstain_reason":"Prior actions are mixed changes with no stated recurring symptom, failed prior patches, or shared repair-effect family at one boundary."}
